summary: The South Bay's funding frenzy shows no signs of cooling: Nexthop AI's $500M Series B in Santa Clara and MatX's matching haul in Mountain View highlight another banner week for local startups chasing AI, robotics, and chip breakthroughs. Seventeen companies landed capital in March alone, with hiring holding steady across the region despite two firms tightening belts. Tuesday's voice AI panel at Santa Clara County Library underscores where investor dollars are flowing.
